\item \textit{Notes}: Teams are 3-letter codes. Round-robin body: row team's score against the column team. Right panels report W/D/L/Pts and qualification \%: Actual is the real record so far; Frozen, Track~A, and Track~B give the projected final record (each remaining game resolved at that track's predicted scoreline) and that track's qual.
